creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 172203
patch

Update to 1.25 and take maintainership. Integrate pkg-plist to Makefile. Remove .sh from installed rc.d script.

Upstream changes:

- Improvements to the FreeBSD startup script. (Craig Leres)

- Improvement to SSL support.

Important: Please delete pkg-plist, the patch makes it obsolete.
